prompt: You are worker P1-A. Create detailed technical design doc for membership lifecycle model (candidate/active/inactive/exit), audit trail, and migration strategy compatible with current prisma schema. Output docs/internal/phase1-membership-schema-design.md and include rollout + rollback plan and testing strategy. Commit branch.

You are worker P1-B. Create implementation backlog with executable checklist for Phase 1 membership module (API/actions/pages/tests), mapped to MASTER-PLAN-KOPERASI-UMUM.md. Output docs/internal/phase1-membership-implementation-backlog.md and update progress file with next sprint targets. Commit branch.
